diagrams.title: Selection Sort Pass Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows array partitioned into sorted and unsorted sections, with minimum element being moved to sorted portion
elements: Swap arrow between minimum and first unsorted position
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how the sorted portion grows from left to right

diagrams.title: Comparison Count Triangle
diagrams.description: Visual representation of total comparisons using triangular number concept
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing why time complexity is O(n²)

diagrams.title: Sorted vs Unsorted Partition
diagrams.description: Depicts the state of array after k passes showing k elements in final sorted positions
elements: Sorted section with k elements (filled color)
Arrow showing next minimum to be placed
diagrams.purpose: Understanding algorithm termination and position guarantee
